summary: OmniVibe Code-Builder pivot tested end-to-end (backend + frontend). All 16 new code-builder backend tests PASS including the 2.5-minute real LLM codebase generation (~17 files) and the full AI patch flow (plan -> pending -> apply -> rollback). All workspace UI tabs (Code, Live Preview, AI Chat, Build, Deploy, Export) load, their data-testid hooks exist, and integrations with the backend are wired correctly. Dashboard renders file_count + build_status badges per project. NewProjectDialog exposes all required fields. No critical bugs found.
critical_code_review_comments: Workspace.js and code_service.py are large files; consider splitting code_service.py into generation/patches/exports modules as the surface grows.

NewProjectDialog testid naming uses suffixes (-input/-select/-checkbox/-button) while review request stated short names. Both are valid; consider documenting the convention for downstream test authors.

Monaco editor's content area intercepts pointer events on plain clicks — for future Playwright tests, focus via keyboard tab or use the .monaco-editor textarea with force=True and slight wait before typing.
test_credentials: Bearer test_session_omnivibe_2026 (user test-user-omnivibe, test.user.omnivibe@example.com) — valid until 2026-07-13
seed_data_creation: Two TEST_-prefixed projects auto-created and auto-cleaned during pytest run (TestProjectCreate + TestCodebaseGeneration.small_proj). NoteApp (proj_5994329743314b39) reused as the long-lived test project with 18 generated files.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reuse /app/backend/tests/test_codebuilder.py for regression. Codebase generation test takes ~2.5min, patch test ~15-30s, all others <2s. NewProjectDialog testids use suffix pattern: new-project-{field}-{input|select|checkbox|button}. Existing project NoteApp has 18 generated files and is the canonical fixture; if cleaned, the small_proj fixture will regenerate one in ~2 min.
rca of the issue: No bugs identified. Codebase generation, patch workflow, build checks, ZIP/Markdown exports, file CRUD with tree, chat history — all functional. Backend properly uses asyncio.create_task for background generation (POST returns in <2s with status=in_progress, polling reflects progress to completed). Frontend workspace correctly polls via the API and renders Monaco/Sandpack/PatchPreviewDialog.
